docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,229.20 FILED BY ARNOLD, MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT IMAOKA, KRISTEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-04-2002 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT IMAOKA, KRISTEN

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-04-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-2003 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506 IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS W/ THE PAYMENT, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 4-7-03 @ 6:30 PM. AND THE COURT WILL CONTINUE THE ACTION FOR AN ADDITIONAL 5 MONTHS.
PLTFF'S REQUEST FOR AN ORDER TO ADVANCE THE HEARIN G DATE TO 2/3/03 AT 5:30PM(CAL:8-2);PAID $10 CASH; TO FOLDER FOR DECISION.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARNOLD, MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT IMAOKA, KRISTEN $854.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $854.50, (NO FURTHER TIME PAYMENTS OR ARRANGEMENTS) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT IMAOKA, KRISTEN
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-07-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-03-2003 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 ORDER GRANTED.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT IMAOKA, KRISTEN
